profile.heading: Profile
profile.nameTooLong: Name must be at most {{count}} characters.

password.heading: Change password
password.tooShort: New password must be at least {{count}} characters.
password.doNotMatch: The new passwords do not match.
password.changed: Password changed. Other devices have been signed out.

notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.description: In-app notifications are always on. This controls whether we also email you a digest of updates on tickets you watch.

apiKeys.heading: API keys
apiKeys.description: Personal access tokens for the public API (<1>/api/v1</1>). Send as <4>Authorization: Bearer ptk_…</4>. Keys are scoped and can never delete data or reach admin.
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet. Create one above.
apiKeys.label: API key

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API key?
revokeDialog.message: Revoke {{name}}? Any client using it will stop working immediately. This cannot be undone.
